content.text:
[Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]

Audit /home/den/aether for LOGISTICS-specific domain language in ALL non-Python files:

1. Frontend (if exists): Vue components, TypeScript types, store files
2. Config files: YAML, JSON, .env, docker-compose
3. Documentation: README, docs/, any .md files
4. Scripts: shell scripts, Makefile
5. Test data: JSON fixtures, CSV, seed data

Search for:
- marine terms (vessel, port, berth, shipping, maritime, cargo, freight)
- logistics terms (dispatch, tracking, waybill, bill_of_lading, customs, demurrage)
- Russian logistics terms (логистик, груз, судно, порт, перевозк, отгрузк, таможн)
- References to logicore project
- Anything that assumes the tenant is a logistics company

For each finding report file + line + issue + fix.

Also run: find /home/den/aether -type f \( -name "*.vue" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.env*" \) | head -50 to see what non-Python files exist.

Begin. Execute the assigned task to completion.

I'll audit the /home/den/aether directory for LOGISTICS-specific domain language in non-Python files. Let me first check what non-Python files exist in the directory.

<function=exec>
<parameter=command>
find /home/den/aether -type f \( -name "*.vue" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.env*" \) | head -50
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

I'll audit the /home/den/aether directory for LOGISTICS-specific domain language in non-Python files. Let me first check what non-Python files exist in the directory.

<function=exec>
<parameter=command>
find /home/den/aether -type f \( -name "*.vue" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.env*" \) | head -50
</parameter>
